question_text: The magnetic field strength around a bar magnet is strongest at which location?

options.label: A
options.text: At the centre of the magnet

options.label: C
options.text: At equal distance from both poles

options.label: D
options.text: The field strength is uniform everywhere around the magnet

explanation: The magnetic field is strongest at the poles of a magnet, where the field lines are closest together. The field becomes weaker further away from the magnet.
